case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. JOHN COLLIER PYLE (SBN 98212)

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PYLE (SBN 98212), JOHN COLLIER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA SERVED APR-06-2009, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT PYLE (SBN 98212), JOHN COLLIER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PYLE (SBN 98212), JOHN COLLIER $4,515.00 PRINCIPAL, $806.03 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, $147.00 FOR CLIENT SECURITY FUND PROCESSING FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,668.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
